benefits.description: Skin has never felt softer, thicker, healthier, and better overall

protocol_notes: Uses topical GHK-CU cosmetic grade powder at 3% concentration mixed with hyaluronic acid on body areas (stomach, thighs, underarms). Applies morning and night on rotation. Avoids combining GHK-CU with certain skincare ingredients (acids, vitamin C) that interfere. Uses retinol serum and cream, cerave cleanser and moisturizer, bio oil, chemical sunscreen without zinc. Dry brushes skin and exfoliates 1-2x weekly with sugar scrub.
